content.full_text:
January 17, 1992

Ms. Linda Moureaux
FPPC
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Moureaux:

Per our telephone conversation today, this is a request for written advice regarding permissable use of PAC funds. You advised today that using our existing PAC funds for advocacy of issues is permissable and should be treated as an expenditure and reported on Schedule E of the FPPC reporting Form 620. Heretofore PAC funds have been used primarily for contributions to candidate campaigns and related administrative expenses.

Please respond to this request as soon as possible. If there will be a delay in your response, please phone me at (916) 441-1515. Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Debbie Lozito
Admin. Asst.
